contents.payloadHashMethod: sha256(sorted path\0sha256(content)\n excluding version.json and artifact.json)

notes: Full cumulative source-handoff based on the verified cooking-kettles and mobile-navigation releases.
Completes the restaurant ventilation cluster: 44 canonical pages, 8 direct redirects, media, navigation, forms and analytics.
Post-activate installs nginx runtime-hardening and validates nginx before reload.
Internal links, canonical annotations and sitemap point directly to final ventilation URLs.
Deploy only through canonical mosrollout flow; do not rsync --delete.
Canonical .github/workflows/deploy.yml must be preserved by rollout kit.
description: Полный cumulative source-handoff MosPochin с финальной переработкой ресторанной вентиляции, медиасистемой, перелинковкой, формами, аналитикой и восемью прямыми Nginx 301.
